headline: Built for real businesses. Not agencies.
subheadline: We cut the fluff and focus on what actually matters — a great website at a fair monthly price.

features.title: No contracts
features.description: Month-to-month. Cancel anytime, no questions asked.

features.title: No large upfront cost
features.description: Start your professional website without spending thousands upfront.

features.title: Live in days, not months
features.description: Most websites go live within 48–72 hours of content approval.

features.title: Transparent pricing
features.description: One flat monthly price. No hidden fees. No surprises.

features.title: Always mobile-first
features.description: Every website works beautifully on phones — where most visitors come from.

features.title: Real human support
features.description: You talk to the person who built your site. No support tickets or chatbots.

testimonials.text: I had my website live in two days. The whole process was effortless.
testimonials.author: Maria K.

testimonials.text: Finally a web service that's affordable and actually looks professional.
testimonials.author: Georgi T.

testimonials.text: My clients always compliment my website. Best investment I've made.
testimonials.author: Elena M.
